body:
The Data Summary Browser provides a summary of the demographics and phenotypes within cohorts from the AMP-AD, AMP-CMD, AMP-PDRD (MSSM Single Nucleus Brain Study), and AMP-RA/SLE projects for which FAIRplex has generated the first phase of harmonized single cell RNA-sequencing. The summaries included here are made available in alignment across AMP projects' data governance policies. Categories with fewer than 20 individuals are suppressed and grouped into the "Unknown" category to reduce the risk of re-identification. All variables are based on clinical data and demographics available from the source AMP.

Select the desired AMP program(s) to begin. Large pie charts summarize each variable within the entire selected cohort across all selected AMP programs. Smaller pie charts show the breakdown of each variable within each individual selected AMP program.
